events.title: FIFA World Cup 2026 + Czech Republic vs Mexico
events.note: Combined main weekly storyline for Czech audience, no official logos or exact tournament branding in visuals.
events.marketing_angle: personal greeting before a big Czech World Cup match
events.why_selected: Major world tournament plus Czech national team match is the strongest Czech-relevant social topic of the week.

events.title: International Day Against Drug Abuse and Illicit Trafficking
events.note: Important international awareness day for thoughtful Melody4U content with no fearmongering.
events.marketing_angle: thoughtful awareness message with hope and support
events.why_selected: A main significant day where a respectful bilingual message can fit Melody4U social content.

events.title: Memorial Day for Victims of the Communist Regime / Political Prisoners
events.note: Czech memorial day requiring calm, dignified and respectful visual language.
events.why_selected: A major Czech memorial day that should be included with the right respectful tone.

events.title: Formula 1 Austrian Grand Prix
events.note: Top motorsport priority close to Czech fans, visuals must avoid official F1 branding.
events.marketing_angle: gift for a racing fan before the weekend
events.why_selected: Formula 1 is the top motorsport storyline after Czech/world tournament themes and main significant days.

events.title: MotoGP Dutch TT Assen
events.note: Major motorcycle racing weekend, below Formula 1 in editorial order.
events.marketing_angle: weekend racing spirit for motorcycle fans
events.why_selected: MotoGP is an important major sport but ranks below F1 and Czech national tournament themes.

events.title: Wimbledon qualification
events.note: Recognizable summer tennis storyline with safe symbolic grass-court visuals.
events.marketing_angle: summer sport vibes for tennis fans
events.why_selected: Wimbledon qualification is a recognizable tennis moment if capacity remains after top themes.

events.title: St. John’s Day / Jan / midsummer mood
events.note: Czech seasonal and name-day friendly moment, useful only as a softer secondary theme.
events.why_selected: A Czech tradition and name-day mood can support a warm Melody4U greeting if capacity remains.
